name: 16-escape-proto-pollution
description: Prototype-pollution payloads as attribute names/values: __proto__, constructor, prototype. Because attributes live in Maps (never as object properties) these are inert data. Setting attr __proto__ on my own object is a legal, journaled write of a literal attribute named __proto__; it must NOT mutate any JS prototype. The integrity probe afterwards proves the engine still computes correctly (num.add(1,1) => 2).
